---
title: "flat_long_term_trends.Rmd"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r development, include=FALSE}
library(testthat)
```

```{r development-load}
# Load already included functions if relevant
pkgload::load_all(export_all = FALSE)
```


# safe_mmkh
 
```{r function-safe_mmkh}
#' Mann-Kendall test p-value
#' 
#' @param x vector
#' 
#' @importFrom modifiedmk mmkh
#'
#' @return function
#' 
#' @noRd
safe_mmkh <- function(x) {
  x <- as.numeric(x)
  x <- x[!is.na(x)]

  if (length(x) < 4) return(NA_real_)

  modifiedmk::mmkh(x)[["new P-value"]]
}
```
  
# safe_sen
 
```{r function-safe_sen}
#' Sen's slope with NAs
#' 
#' @param x vector
#' 
#' @importFrom trend sens.slope
#'
#' @return Sen's slope
#' 
#' @noRd
safe_sen <- function(x) {
  x <- na.omit(x)

  if(length(x) < 2) return(NA_real_)

  as.numeric(trend::sens.slope(x)$estimates)
}
```

# test_monotonic_trend

```{r function-test_monotonic_trend}
#' Get Mann-Kendall test p-value and Sen's slope values by estuary, haline_zone and season
#' 
#' @param data tibble with estuary, haline_zone, season, parameter, RESULTAT variables
#' @param parameter character, variable which trend is to be studied
#'
#' @return tibble with estuary, haline_zone, season, mk_parameter_p, sen_parameter_slope 
#' 
#' @noRd
test_monotonic_trend <- function(data, parameter){
    
  filtered_data <- data |>
    filter(PARAMETRE_LIBELLE == {{parameter}}) |> 
    group_by(estuary, haline_zone, year, season) |> 
    summarise(RESULTAT = mean(RESULTAT, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |> 
    tidyr::complete(estuary, haline_zone, season, year)
  
  # Mann-Kendall non-monotonic trend test with autocorrelation correction
  mk_parameter_p <- filtered_data |> 
    arrange(estuary, haline_zone, season, year) |>
    group_by(estuary, haline_zone, season) |> 
    summarise(mk_parameter = safe_mmkh(RESULTAT), .groups = "drop")
  
  # Theil–Sen estimator
  sen_parameter_slope <- filtered_data |> 
    arrange(estuary, haline_zone, season, year) |>
    group_by(estuary, haline_zone, season) |> 
    summarise(sen_slope_parameter = safe_sen(RESULTAT), .groups = "drop")
  
  # Join
  monotonic_stats <- full_join(
  mk_parameter_p,
  sen_parameter_slope,
  by = c("estuary", "haline_zone", "season")
)
  
  return(monotonic_stats)
}
```

```{r development-inflate, eval=FALSE}
# Run but keep eval=FALSE to avoid infinite loop
# Execute in the console directly
fusen::inflate(flat_file = "dev/flat_long_term_trends.Rmd", 
               vignette_name = NULL, overwrite = TRUE, check = FALSE)
```
